ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact details of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Patient's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* Patient's city */,
  "state" TEXT /* Patient's state */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Patient's zip code */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Patient's insurance provider */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact for the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient whose metrics are recorded */,
  "pregnant" INTEGER /* Number of pregnancies */,
  "plasma" INTEGER /* Plasma glucose concentration in an oral glucose tolerance test */,
  "pressure" INTEGER /* Diastolic blood pressure (mm Hg) */,
  "thickness" INTEGER /* Triceps skin fold thickness (mm) */,
  "insulin" INTEGER /* 2-Hour serum insulin (mu U/ml) */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body mass index (weight in kg/(height in m)^2) */,
  "pedigree" REAL /* Diabetes pedigree function */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were recorded */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the patient in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the patient in kilograms */,
  "waist_circumference" REAL /* Waist circumference of the patient in centimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diabetes_risk" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diabetes risk assessment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient being assessed */,
  "risk_score" REAL /* Calculated risk score based on health metrics */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Categorized risk level (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "date_assessed" TEXT /* Date when the risk was assessed */,
  "predicted_risk_category" TEXT /* Predicted risk category (e.g., Type 1, Type 2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diabetes_risk_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient with the appointment */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the appointment */,
  "appointment_type" TEXT /* Type of appointment (e.g., Checkup, Consultation) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the appointment */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the healthcare provider */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the appointment in minutes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., Scheduled, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient prescribed the medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the medication intake */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the medication was started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the medication was stopped */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the healthcare provider who prescribed the medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare provider */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the provider */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the provider (e.g., Endocrinologist) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact details of the provider */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital where the provider works */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_providers_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for account security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, admin) */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the healthcare provider (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user logging in */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., Appointment, Medication) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the patient (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blood_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blood test */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient who underwent the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of blood test (e.g., fasting glucose) */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the blood test */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the result (e.g., mg/dL) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blood_tests_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the hospital */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the hospital is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the hospital is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the hospital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_specializations" (
  "specialization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specialization */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the healthcare provider */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the provider (e.g., Endocrinologist) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specialization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_specializations_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)
